title: MiniUtilities Flight Fix
description: Forked from MiniUtilities to fix issues related to creative flight
body:
Forked from https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/miniutilities by OneLemonyBoii

Fixes bugs related to flying

Mini Utilities is a mod inspired by XU1 and XU2 which takes features from each of them, while adding its own features.

LEMONLIB IS REQUIRED!!!

Original features:

New, higher tier  armour:
- Infused
- Unstable

Infused armour also gives creative flight.

Angel rings that give creative flight. There are different types, so you can choose what your wings look like.

Mechanical placer, and breaker to automatically harvest blocks

Spikes that will deal damage to anyone who stands on them.

Cursed, blessed, and blursed dirt, which spawn mobs at a very high rate.

My changes:
Flight isn't canceled when scrolling through hotbar
No more conflict with creative flight items from other mods
